steps.title: Compare the outputs
steps.content: The passage gives the Beatrice wind farm's output and then gives Hornsea Project One's much larger output. The relationship is a side-by-side numerical comparison.

steps.title: Reject other transitions
steps.content: A would make Hornsea merely an example, B would create a cause-and-effect relationship, and C would present a restatement. The sentence needs a comparison signal. The answer is D.
